steps.title: Compare the factored forms
steps.content: The target form is $ry^4(13y-7)$. Factor the original expression to make that same structure appear.

steps.title: Check the result
steps.content: Expanding the factored form confirms it: $$4y^4(13y-7)=52y^5-28y^4.$$ This matches the original expression, so $r=4$.
